Crystal Gym Leaders & Elite Four

	As usual, in Crystal you battle your way through 8 gyms, each specializing in a particular type. Following that you take on the Elite Four and the Champion. In fact all the teams and levels are the game as Gold/Silver.

The 8 gyms in Johto are different types to those in Kanto, and the Elite Four has some changes from generation 1.

### Gym Leaders
[Falkner](#gym-1) (Violet City)[Bugsy](#gym-2) (Azalea Town)[Whitney](#gym-3) (Goldenrod City)[Morty](#gym-4) (Ecruteak City)[Chuck](#gym-5) (Cianwood City)[Jasmine](#gym-6) (Olivine City)[Pryce](#gym-7) (Mahogany Town)[Clair](#gym-8) (Blackthorn City)[Brock](#gym-9) (Pewter City)[Misty](#gym-10) (Cerulean City)[Lt. Surge](#gym-11) (Vermilion City)[Erika](#gym-12) (Celadon City)[Janine](#gym-13) (Fuchsia City)[Sabrina](#gym-14) (Saffron City)[Blaine](#gym-15) (Cinnabar Island)[Blue](#gym-16) (Viridian City)
### Elite Four
[Will](#elite4-1)[Koga](#elite4-2)[Bruno](#elite4-3)[Karen](#elite4-4)[Lance](#champion-5)
